claim_text: Furthermore, DMI avoids the 1 H MRS need for water and lipid suppression due to the low natural abundance of 2 H, and its low Larmor frequency minimizes sensitivity to B0 inhomogeneities39,40 .

sub_claims.text: Furthermore, DMI avoids the 1 H MRS need for water and lipid suppression due to the low natural abundance of 2 H, and its low Larmor frequency minimizes sensitivity to B0 inhomogeneities39,40 .
